payload.title: Cloud auth middleware: JWT session + API key, drop shared token; tenancy from claims
payload.description: Replace the cloud-mode authMiddleware (currently shared bearer token + trustLoopback) with: verifyAccessToken (cookie/Bearer) OR authenticateApiKey for non-interactive callers. Remove the shared-token and loopback bypass in cloud mode. Derive tenant/project from the subject claims (authz.js), and STOP trusting the client-supplied X-Scope-Workspace header (ADR 0003 §4). Core security change.
